title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Southall Travellers Ltd
body: "Application number 5107  Applicant Southall Travel Limited objected to the name used by Southall Travellers Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 4 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Southall Travellers Ltd is changed to 15834249, LTD. "
